title: clients.yml
description: Per-client configuration for the GS1 Digital Link Orchestrator. Derived from PROJECT_HANDOVER.md §10.1 and IMPLEMENTATION_SPEC.md §2.4. Secrets are never stored here; *_env keys name environment variables that hold them.

version.description: Config schema version. Locked at 1 for v0.1.0.

defaults.description: Settings inherited by every client unless overridden per client.

clients.description: Map of client_id to that client's configuration.

environment.description: Which GS1 NL environment to target.

api_version.description: Digital Link API version. Locked at v2 for v0.1.0.

identification_key_type.description: GS1 identifier type. Always Gtin for v0.1.0 scope.

digital_link_url_pattern.description: Template for the canonical Digital Link URI; {gtin14} is substituted.

default_media_type.description: mediaType applied to links that don't specify one (e.g. text/html).

batch_size.description: Entries per request to the bulk upsert endpoint.

resolver_domain_name.description: Only meaningful when use_gs1_resolver is false.

account_number_test.description: accountNumber for the test/sandbox environment — taken from the minted token's accountNumber claim. Differs from production.

account_number_production.description: accountNumber for the production environment. Verify against MyGS1.

client_id_env_test.description: Name of the env var holding the test/sandbox OAuth2 client id.

client_secret_env_test.description: Name of the env var holding the test/sandbox OAuth2 client secret.

client_id_env_production.description: Name of the env var holding the production OAuth2 client id.

client_secret_env_production.description: Name of the env var holding the production OAuth2 client secret.

wpml_helper_path.description: Path to the site-side WPML helper route (multilingual_plugin: wpml only). WPML exposes no core REST route for language assignment or translation linking; the namespace is per-site.

site_url.description: Base URL of the client's WordPress site.

username.description: Automation user (Editor role) for REST calls.

app_password_env.description: Name of the env var holding the WordPress application password.

wpml_helper_path.description: Path to the site-side WPML helper route (multilingual_plugin: wpml only). WPML exposes no core REST route for language assignment or translation linking; the namespace is per-site.

taxonomies.description: Map of WordPress taxonomy slug to how its terms are sourced.

map_from_column.description: ProductRecord field / export column that supplies the term.

acf_map.description: Map of ACF field name to the ProductRecord field feeding it, for themes that render from ACF rather than post_content (e.g. Oxygen). Reach into extras with 'extras.{name}'. Omit for clients that render from the body template.

slug_pattern.description: Slug template, e.g. 'p-{gtin}'. Immutable once printed on packaging.

target_url_pattern.description: Template for the page URL the resolver points at.

format.description: Export layout. 'flat' = single-sheet MyGS1 article list; 'gdsn' = multi-sheet GS1 Data Source / GDSN datapool export.

path.description: Path to the client's GS1 Data Source / MyGS1 Excel/CSV export.

column_map.description: Flat format: mapping between export columns and ProductRecord field paths (a map of string to string).

extras_columns.description: Flat format: export columns carried through verbatim into ProductRecord.extras.

market_language.description: GDSN format: mapping of TargetMarketCountryCode to the language it supplies, e.g. {"528": "nl", "056": "fr"}.

gdsn_map.description: GDSN format: mapping of ProductRecord field name to the GDSN attribute source.

gdsn_extras.description: GDSN format: named pass-through attributes carried into ProductRecord.extras.

attribute.description: GDSN attribute number (e.g. '3297') or a path segment name (e.g. 'GpcCategoryCode').

localised.description: Whether the attribute is a per-language LanguageCode/Value group.

with_unit.description: Whether to append the paired MeasurementUnitCode to the value.

max_length.description: Longest this value is expected to be, in characters. A longer value is reported to source_issues.json and kept verbatim — never truncated. Omit for no expectation.

strip_prefix.description: Literal prefix removed from the resolved value when present (e.g. 'Noviplast ' where the feed repeats the brand in the product name). Matched exactly; a value that only resembles the prefix is reported as a likely source-data misspelling and left unchanged, never repaired.

primary_file.description: Whether to resolve the primary referenced-file URI (for image_url).

override_dir.description: Directory holding this client's template overrides.

files.description: Map of language code to template filename.

default.description: Whether this is the default link type for the identifier.

per_language.description: Emit one link per configured language.

title_pattern.description: Template for the link title, e.g. '{product_name}'.

on_change.description: Behaviour when a re-run detects changed rows (default: prompt).

on_missing_field.description: Behaviour when a required per-language field is missing (default: prompt).

websiteStatus.description: Operator-maintained control file gating page/QR creation (create-only).

enabled.description: Whether this client is processed. Defaults to true when omitted.
